title: glochidion castaneum
intro: Glochidion castaneum, also known as the Indian cork tree or Indian brown cork tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glochidion castaneum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is commonly used to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties.
